highlights.title: JobHop v2: A Large-Scale Career Trajectory Dataset from Unstructured Resumes
highlights.summary: JobHop v2 dataset released with 440,000 resumes
highlights.detail: JobHop v2 improves upon the original release with broader coverage and richer annotations, including ESCO occupational codes and quarter-level temporal information.

highlights.title: Upcoming: Codeforces Round 1111 (Div. 2)
highlights.detail: The contest is open to all participants.

highlights.title: MET: Theory-Grounded and Culture-Aware Multilingual Moral Reasoning
highlights.summary: MET introduced for multilingual moral reasoning
highlights.detail: MET addresses gaps in multilingual moral decision-making by introducing a theory-grounded prompting method and a culturally situated moral decision-making benchmark.

highlights.title: VoxENES 2026: Benchmarking Generalization of Speech Spoofing Detectors Against LLM-Era TTS and Voice Conversion
highlights.summary: VoxENES 2026 benchmark for speech spoofing detectors
highlights.detail: VoxENES 2026 highlights the temporal generalization gap in current detectors and evaluates their performance against modern speech synthesis methods.

highlights.title: How to manage AI investments in the agentic era
highlights.summary: Managing AI investments in the agentic era
highlights.detail: Enterprises can manage AI investments by measuring useful work per dollar, improving efficiency, and scaling high-value workflows.

items.title: JobHop v2: A Large-Scale Career Trajectory Dataset from Unstructured Resumes
items.summary: JobHop v2 dataset released with 440,000 resumes
items.detail: JobHop v2 improves upon the original release with broader coverage and richer annotations, including ESCO occupational codes and quarter-level temporal information.

items.title: MET: Theory-Grounded and Culture-Aware Multilingual Moral Reasoning
items.summary: MET introduced for multilingual moral reasoning
items.detail: MET addresses gaps in multilingual moral decision-making by introducing a theory-grounded prompting method and a culturally situated moral decision-making benchmark.

items.title: VoxENES 2026: Benchmarking Generalization of Speech Spoofing Detectors Against LLM-Era TTS and Voice Conversion
items.summary: VoxENES 2026 benchmark for speech spoofing detectors
items.detail: VoxENES 2026 highlights the temporal generalization gap in current detectors and evaluates their performance against modern speech synthesis methods.

items.title: How to manage AI investments in the agentic era
items.summary: Managing AI investments in the agentic era
items.detail: Enterprises can manage AI investments by measuring useful work per dollar, improving efficiency, and scaling high-value workflows.

items.title: Announcements Jun 30, 2026 Claude Science, an AI workbench for scientists, is now available Claude Science is a customizable app that integrates the tools and packages researchers most often use, produces auditable artifacts, and provides flexible access to computing resources.
items.summary: Claude Science AI workbench released
items.detail: Claude Science is a customizable app that integrates tools and packages for researchers, producing auditable artifacts and providing flexible access to computing resources.

items.title: Announcements Jun 30, 2026 Redeploying Fable 5 Fable 5 returns globally July 1. We're also proposing an industry-wide framework for scoring jailbreak severity, together with Amazon, Microsoft, Google, and other Glasswing partners.
items.summary: Fable 5 redeployed globally
items.detail: Fable 5 returns globally, and an industry-wide framework for scoring jailbreak severity is proposed in partnership with other companies.

items.title: Empowering India’s next generation of innovators with ATL Saathi
items.summary: ATL Saathi AI tool launched
items.detail: ATL Saathi is a Gemini-powered AI tool that empowers Indian educators in robotics labs, launched by Google and AIM.

items.title: How data science teams use ChatGPT Work
items.summary: ChatGPT Work for data science teams
items.detail: Data science teams can use ChatGPT Work to build root-cause briefs, impact readouts, and other analyses from real work inputs.

items.title: How sales teams use ChatGPT Work
items.summary: ChatGPT Work for sales teams
items.detail: Sales teams can use ChatGPT Work to create pipeline briefs, meeting prep packets, and other sales materials from real work inputs.

items.title: Inviting hard questions Announcements Jul 9, 2026 We’re asking the public for their hardest questions about AI, and committing to show our work as we address them.
items.summary: Public invited to submit AI questions
items.detail: The public is invited to submit their hardest questions about AI, and the company will address them and show their work.

items.title: Get your ESP32 Sunny Side Up with this Solar Dev Board
items.summary: Solar Dev Board for ESP32
items.detail: A new development board for the ESP32 chip is available, featuring a solar panel and other components for development and prototyping.

items.title: Call for topics for the 2026 Maintainers Summit
items.summary: Call for topics for 2026 Maintainers Summit
items.detail: The Maintainers Summit is an annual gathering of kernel developers and maintainers to discuss development-process issues, and topic proposals are being accepted until July 24.

items.title: Security updates for Monday
items.summary: Debian, Fedora, and others issue security updates
items.detail: The updates address various vulnerabilities in packages such as chromium and libxfont.

items.title: Security updates for Tuesday
items.summary: AlmaLinux, Debian, and others issue security updates
items.detail: The updates fix vulnerabilities in packages like kernel and libreoffice.

items.title: [$] Sending packets directly from BPF
items.summary: Tetragon sends packets directly from BPF
items.detail: This improvement removes the need for a user-space agent, enhancing security.

items.title: [$] Shielding running kernels against exploits with BPF
items.summary: Cisco uses BPF to prevent kernel exploits
items.detail: The technique reduces the time needed to respond to kernel vulnerabilities.

items.title: Upcoming: Codeforces Round 1111 (Div. 2)
items.summary: Codeforces Round 1111 starts on July 18
items.detail: The contest is open to all participants.

items.title: Show HN: Jacquard, a programming language for AI-written, human-reviewed code
items.summary: Jacquard is a new programming language
items.detail: It was designed by analyzing ASTs of mainstream languages and creating a new structure.

items.title: Complexity Theory of Randomised Testing
items.summary: Complexity theory of randomized testing is presented
items.detail: The theory provides a foundation for random generators in software testing.

items.title: On Thread Convergence
items.summary: Convergence analysis for thread synchronization
items.detail: The analysis helps compilers determine when barriers are necessary.

items.title: A Separation Logic for Parallel Time Complexity with Work and Span Credits
items.summary: Parcas is a separation logic for parallel time complexity
items.detail: It abstracts from machine specifics and uses work and span credits.

items.title: AutoSLO: Practical Latency SLOs on Cloud Data Warehouses -- Extended Version
items.summary: AutoSLO is a latency-SLO-aware workload management framework
items.detail: It operates across three timescales to manage cloud data warehouses.

items.title: Mizzle: A Complete Concurrent Incorrectness Logic for Preventing False Alarms in Agentic Bug Finding
items.summary: Mizzle is a concurrent incorrectness logic
items.detail: It prevents false alarms in agentic bug finding by requiring machine-checked proofs.

items.title: LizardByte/Sunshine
items.summary: LizardByte/Sunshine is a self-hosted game stream host
items.detail: It is designed for Moonlight game streaming.

items.title: jackwener/wx-cli
items.summary: WeChat local data CLI released
items.detail: The CLI utilizes a daemon architecture, allowing for efficient data management. This tool can be useful for developers working with WeChat data.

items.title: Graphify-Labs/graphify
items.summary: Graphify-Labs/graphify AI coding assistant
items.detail: Graphify can handle various file types, including code, SQL schemas, and documents. It integrates multiple AI coding assistants, such as Claude Code and Codex.

items.title: PrefectHQ/prefect
items.summary: Prefect workflow orchestration framework
items.detail: Prefect is designed for building resilient data pipelines in Python. It provides a flexible framework for workflow management.

items.title: PrimeIntellect-ai/verifiers
items.summary: PrimeIntellect-ai/verifiers library released
items.detail: The library is designed for RL environments and evaluations. It provides a set of tools for reinforcement learning development.

items.title: UZ-SLAMLab/ORB_SLAM3
items.summary: ORB-SLAM3 library released
items.detail: ORB-SLAM3 is an open-source library for visual, visual-inertial, and multi-map SLAM. It provides an accurate and efficient solution for SLAM tasks.
